title: One arrested after fatal accident in Kaaimans Pass
description: GEORGE NEWS - One person was arrested for...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - One person was arrested for driving under the influence of alcohol after a fatal car accident in the Kaaimans Pass last night, Thursday 13 March.


> According to Southern Cape police spokesperson Sergeant Chris Spies, a culpable homicide docket was opened following the death of a 38-year-old man on the N2 in Kaaimans Pass at about 20:40.


"Preliminary reports available suggest police were dispatched to the scene following a collision between a Volkswagen Polo and Toyota Hilux bakkie. On arrival, they found the vehicles and a man who had sustained serious injuries," says Spies.

Paramedics later declared the driver of the Polo deceased on the scene.

A man believed to be the driver of the Hilux bakkie was taken into custody on the scene.

More information will be made available as the investigation unfolds.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
